creator: vasiliirussu@gmail.com
text:
Hi guys!
First of all, Thank a lot for the Great system You made!
PC BSD is really Great.
Here I found a big bug, it´s regarding the displaying the keyboard layout in PC BSD 10.1.1, as on Lumina as on KDE desktop environment. My keyboard is a QWERTY laptop keyboard. Acer Aspire E1-531.
The keyboard layout is changing, yes, but the flag and country code is not displaying, so you could not inspect the element without experimenting and pushing the keys changing the layouts. It´s really annoying! 
For example I use English, Russian and Romanian layouts (I am from Moldova), hundreds of millions of people who live in Russia, Ukraine, Belarus and Central Asia use the Russian both with English, so this people really need this bug to be solved. 
Thank You in advance, waiting the bug to be solved ASAP.

Greetings,
Basil
